findings.description: Overview states monitoring runs continuously in parallel, but Stage 4 is numbered sequentially with Stages 1–3, implying a sequential position.
findings.evidence: Overview: "Monitoring runs continuously in parallel with all stages." Architecture section: Stage 1, Stage 2, Stage 3, Stage 4 — sequential numbering.
findings.suggestion: Rename 'Stage 4 — Monitoring' to 'Continuous Monitoring' or add a parenthetical clarifying it runs continuously alongside other stages.
